## Originality and safety

- [ ] The contribution is original or all compatible third-party material and notices are identified.
- [ ] No credentials, private repository content, personal data, or another plugin's branded runtime state is included.
- [ ] The change does not add an undeclared provider or legacy-plugin dependency.
- [ ] Static route checks are not described as interactive proof.
